title: stelis listrophylla
intro: Stelis listrophylla is a species of orchid native to Central and South America, characterized by its unique flowers and leaves. The medicinal properties of Stelis listrophylla include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are believed to be attributed to its bioactive compounds. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and provide relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In traditional herbal preparations, Stelis listrophylla is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
